Holloway, district of the London Borough of Islington in North London, England, also known as Holloway, London. Attributes include:

- country: "United Kingdom"

- shares border with: "Kentish Town",

- historic county: "Middlesex"
- described by source: "The Nuttall Encyclopædia (subject named as: Holloway)"
